permissions.fallback_msg: This skill needs to read local files (credentials, scripts, README, temporary result files). Allow?
This skill needs to write local files (e.g., saving intermediate search results to /tmp). Allow?
This skill needs to run shell commands and Node.js scripts (email-send.js, email-search.js, etc.). Allow?
This skill needs to read API keys and credentials from a local credentials file. Allow?
This skill reads environment variables such as EMAIL_API_BASE_URL. Allow?
This skill sets environment variables such as EMAIL_API_BASE_URL. Allow?
This skill calls the external email REST API at agenskill-api.onrender.com. Allow?
This skill makes HTTP GET requests to the email API (list emails, read email, list contacts, health check, list numbers). Allow?
This skill makes HTTP POST/DELETE requests to the email API (send email, upload file, store number, delete email). Allow?
This skill requires outbound network access to reach the email API server. Allow?
This skill may delete local temporary files as part of chained operations. Allow?
